---
title: "adverse_events"
subtitle: "`adverse_events`"
description: "adverse_events"
---

<!--
NEVER EDIT MANUALLY. This documentation was auto-generated by `seedcase-flower`.
If you want to edit the content, please make changes to the `datapackage.json` file.
-->

- Path: `resources/adverse_events/data.parquet`
- Primary key: (`event`)

| Name                        | Title                        | Type    | Description                                                                            |
|-----------------------------|------------------------------|---------|----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| `event`                     | The unique name of the event | string  | The unique name identifying the event when the form was filled in.                     |
| `center`                    | Research center              | string  | The research center where the data item was recorded.                                  |
| `ae_report_date`            | ae_report_date               | date    | Report date of adverse event. Repeated instrument.                                     |
| `ae_event`                  | ae_event                     | string  | Description of the adverse event. Repeated instrument.                                 |
| `ae_start`                  | ae_start                     | date    | The beginning date of the adverse event. Repeated instrument.                          |
| `ae_ended`                  | ae_ended                     | string  | Whether the incident/side effect is ended. Repeated instrument.                        |
| `ae_end_date`               | ae_end_date                  | date    | The end date of the adverse event. Repeated instrument.                                |
| `ae_phase`                  | ae_phase                     | string  | Study phase in which the adverse event occurred. Repeated instrument.                  |
| `ae_type`                   | ae_type                      | string  | Whether the adverse event is a single event or periodic event. Repeated instrument.    |
| `ae_grade`                  | ae_grade                     | string  | Description of the severity of the complication. Repeated instrument.                  |
| `ae_related_study`          | ae_related_study             | string  | Complication's relevance to the study. Repeated instrument.                            |
| `ae_related_study_exp`      | ae_related_study_exp         | string  | Description of how the adverse event is related to the study. Repeated instrument.     |
| `ae_md_date_signature`      | ae_md_date_signature         | date    | Date of signature from medical staff. Repeated instrument.                             |
| `remarks_medical`           | remarks_medical              | string  | Any remarks from medical staff. Repeated instrument.                                   |
| `ae_physician_assessed___1` | Signeret                     | boolean | Assessed by physician (only a physician may complete this field). Repeated instrument. |

: Fields in the `adverse_events` resource.
